caption: The video captures a professional setting at the #theCUBE LIVE event during #BigDataSV 2015, held at the Fairmont Hotel's Valley Room in San Jose, CA. Two men are seated at a table, engaged in what appears to be a discussion or interview. The man on the left, dressed in a dark suit and light shirt, is speaking with his hands clasped together, suggesting he is explaining or elaborating on a point. The man on the right, wearing a gray suit and tie, is focused on a laptop in front of him, possibly taking notes or referencing information relevant to the conversation. The backdrop features logos and hashtags related to the event, indicating a tech or data-focused conference. The atmosphere suggests an informative and structured dialogue, likely aimed at sharing insights or knowledge within the big data industry.
